world.name: Science Lab

environment.description: Glass-walled research laboratory with instrument benches, polished epoxy floor, and ambient HUD panels

lighting.base: cool teal key + soft grid bounce

lighting_presets.recipe: cool teal key + soft bounce fill
cool teal key + hard rim + practical instrument glow
bright key + lifted shadows for revelation

design_rules: Keep set geometry continuous across scenes
Vary camera and lighting, not the world itself
Every object must sit on a defined surface

environment.description: Glass-walled research laboratory with instrument benches, polished epoxy floor, and ambient HUD panels

lighting_presets.recipe: cool teal key + soft bounce fill
cool teal key + hard rim + practical instrument glow
bright key + lifted shadows for revelation

continuity.note: Scenes share the same laboratory/set; only camera and lighting change
